entry.title: Re: solution manager 7.2 change BI Client

Could you please check if KBA 1630984 can be helpful?

Leo
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Automating Rate Changes in SAP Fieldglass
entry.content: Great post Marcus, thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Re: ECN API error: Unable to load ECNs of the current ins...
entry.content:
You can delete the instance, if you do not have a ton of objects on your HANA CLOUD, or you can take a backup of those from the HDB Explorer.

Now instead of creating your instance from BTP cockpit, try creating an instance from the HANA CLOUD CENTRAL. In my case, I had to enable PAL(Predictive Analytics Library) to develop a Intelligent HANA Application, however I could do not do so due the same error I got while saving and restarting my instance. 

You can configure your instance with your required parameters in HANA CLOUD CENTRAL. Ideally this should work.

Please note that, this is only a work around and SAP BTP / HANA CLOUD Team needs to fix issues with the trial account.

May

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Property Count
entry.content:
Hi!

I would like to know if it's possible to count the frequency with which the name appears in a property in a dimension, for example, I have a dimension called names and in this dimension I have a property with repeated names, I want to count the frequency with which the same name appears, It's possible to do this via data action in SAC?

entry.title: Re: Video Data Story, a brand-new way of story telling in SAP Analytics Cloud

Hi @carmen-elenam ,

For the first release of VDS, embedded SAC is not supported.

We will need some further evaluation to decide if this scenario will be supported or not.

Thanks a lot for understanding.

entry.title: Re: 视频数据故事（Video Data Story），在SAP分析云中全新的数据展现方式
entry.content: 如果无法登录SAP Media查看视频的话，可以参考下面的截屏gif图，图像质量会略差一些，但是可以大概了解VDS生成的视频的样式。

entry.title: SuccessFactors_unable to default a HRIS field value after BASIC business rule scenario gone
entry.content:
Hi All, 

With the basic rule scenario deprecated, I'm unable to find a simple scenario work. 

My use case is very simple, in the workPermitInfo HRIS element, I would like to always default (country value, let's say USA) in country field when portlet opened to enter a record. When portlet opened, country should be defaulted (however would be able to change) and then I can add other permit data and save it. 

The Trigger onView rules for HRIS elements,  which says "You can use this scenario to create rules that default the value for a field" is not working. 

I've created a onView rule on Base Object workPermitModel and it just doesn't work when assigned to the business rule. In the past I made this scenario work through Basic scenario and with ruletype"DefaultFields".

Can anybody help me on this please? How to achieve this?

Regards

DRP.

@lukemarson @btoombs @svishwas @Daichi_Kagawa, @stockp , @NarendraLahoti , @cindywang , @S_Strangfeld

entry.title: How to set role restriction in the Manage Project Demand
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question regarding business role restrictions.

In the Manage project demand app, I want to ensure that only specific purchase groups are visible based on the user’s business role when creating a demand and assigning a purchase group.

Although I configured the restrictions in Business Role Maintenance, users can still see and assign all purchase groups, not just the restricted ones.

Could you guide me on how to properly set up these restrictions?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector を使ってBTPとイントラネット内のAPI Gateway間でmTLS接続はできますか？
entry.content:
>別レベルでのソリューションがベターな場合もあるかもしれないです。
仰る通りだと思います。社内でもmTLS認証とユーザ識別の機能は結局切り分ける方針になりそうです。

また、mTLS認証自体もCloudConnectorを使うよりかはApprouter＋Destinationのほうがベターであるという意見になりまして、その方向で再度調査しています。

Approuter＋Destinationの問題として、クライアント証明書とクライアントキーのp12ファイルを設定しても、check Connectionだと「Failure reason: "An error of type SSLHandshake occurred during check connection!"」アプリ側からDestinationを呼ぶと502 Bad Gateway になってしまいます。

curlコマンドでp12ファイルを指定したら問題なくアクセスできているので証明書には問題ないと思っているのですが、こちらについて何か知見はございませんでしょうか？

entry.title: Re: Possible to use different weights/ratings in PM Form...
entry.content:
@ellende-paep  Yes this is not possible in one Template level ,you have to configure different Performance form for this requirement.

Thanks

Mridul

Reg
Deb

#SAC_Story

entry.title: Re: How to change the entry screen for Fast entry
entry.content:
I have the following in T588Q

0015 (blank) 4000 5000 RPLFST00

0015 01 4100 5100 RPLFST00

0015 27 4100 5100 RPLFST00

And the following in T588M

MP001500 2000 P0015 (blank) 2000 2100

MP001500 2000 (blank) 22 2000 2100

MP001500 2000 (blank) 27 2000 2100

MP001500 4000 P0015 (blank) 4000 0

MP001500 4000 (blank) 27 4100 0

MP001500 5000 P0015 (blank) 5000 0

MP001500 5000 (blank) 27 5100 0

And in feature P0015

MOLGA 22 –> 22

MOLGA 27 -> 27

Otherwise -> 27

But still not working, appreciate if I can have some insight on what I’ve done wrong or are missing.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: 日本語ディスカッションコミュニティグループ Tokyo へようこそ
entry.content:
お世話になっております。
現在SAP　S4HANAについて学習しているBeckyと申します。
以下の内容について調査しておりますが。
情報があれば、教えていただけませんか。
１．SAP　ERP6.0はSAP Connector to eBAgentで日本の全銀システムとコネクトできますが、SAP　S4HANA　　public cloudもSAP Connector to eBAgentで日本の全銀システムとコネクトも可能ですか。可能であれば、同のような手順で行いますか。
２．SAP　S4HANA　　public cloudで部門別及び得意先別で予算・見積り・実績のレポートがありませんか。

お忙しいところ恐縮ですが、何卒宜しくお願い致します。

entry.title: Re: Is it possible (by rescaling) to avoid section weight...
entry.content:
@ellende-paep  It can be either no section weights will be considered for any section or section weights will be considered.If either of section weight is required then you cannot bypass Summary weight as its a mandatory fields.

Hope this helps 

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Re: the bapi of PO10, PO13
entry.content:
Me ayudó mucho esta BAPI: BAPI_HRMASTER_SAVE_REPL_MULT.

Quería modificar el texto de una posición, delimitando la posición y creando una nueva por medio de una interfaz, y esto me ayudó.

Gracias.

entry.title: Re: Generate an ID number in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi @ElyasD ,

Agree with @Dinu , there is no way you can achieve this via custom scripting. You can generate a randomize ID number. 

Something like this:

Function generateUniqueRandomNumberString(length) {
    const timestamp = Date.now().toString();
    let randomPart = '';
    const characters = '0123456789';
    const charactersLength = characters.length;
    for (let i = 0; i < length - timestamp.length; i++) {
        randomPart += characters.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charactersLength));
    }
    return timestamp + randomPart;
}

// Example
const uniqueRandomNumberString = generateUniqueRandomNumberString(20);
console.log(uniqueRandomNumberString);

What I have implemented on my project was. The generated ID was saved somewhere (S4 Table, Database,Excel). The automation has to get the last ID# in able to add the corresponding sequence.

Regards,

 

weisson

entry.title: Re: Video Data Story, a brand-new way of story telling in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Have to say it is kinda frustrating seeing this type of 'innovation' in SAC when we are still being completely ignored on critical basic functionality such as support for Fiscal Time characteristics on BW Live.

So now I can tell all my Finance users that they can create useless 'Tik-tok' style videos directly in SAC, but they still can't build a basic report on Fiscal Year, or Fiscal Year-to-Date without having to implement workarounds or edit the story each month to update the filters.

Requests for Fiscal Time have been escalated through Account Execs, as well as influence requests that remain at 'For long-term consideration'.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/272506

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/262845

I should add the Fiscal Time issue is only one example of 'core' functionality which is still missing or flawed. Please SAP... listen to customers and focus on the core, not fluff.

Regards, Ivan.

Vivek Savant

entry.title: MACRS Depreciation incorrect value
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

Configuration Steps: Tax Depreciation method "MACRS"

I have created the new Dep. key with below :

0014, 001, 001,U05

U05 Multilevel method as per below :

9999 1 0 01 20.0000 0.0000
9999 2 0 01 32.0000 0.0000
9999 3 0 01 19.2000 0.0000
9999 4 0 01 11.5200 0.0000
9999 5 0 01 11.5200 0.0000
9999 99 0 01 5.7600 0.0000

It is working when the Ordinary Dep. start is 1st Apr.

I get the exact results , if my ODep start date is other than year beginning my Dep. rates are incorrect.

i am using , Apr~Mar Fiscal year.

Ex: If my O.Dep start is 1st Oct , system is calculating 20% from Oct ~ Mar 2nd year system is calulating 20% for 6 months & another 6 months with 32%.

I am expecting system should calulate 32% for all 12 months.

Thanks
Santhosh

entry.title: Custom Price Value Not Updated in Credit Memo Request w.r.t Billing
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

There is a requirement for an implementation on S/4HANA Public Cloud.

It is to create a credit memo request with reference to a billing, with customized pricing condition types.

The creation of the document is through the interface and manual creation.

A customized pricing condition type, ZUDE, included from the order to the billing.

The value of ‘Net Value 2’, in Euro, is assigned to this condition type.

A customized pricing routine, with the code for value calculation, is assigned to the pricing condition line on the pricing procedure.

When a discount, with condition type DRV1, is added onto the price, the following is observed.

  1. The value of ‘Net Value 2’ is updated accordingly.
  2. The value of ZUDE remains unchanged.

The system assigns condition control ‘E’ (Condition value and basis fixed), as a default value.

The same steps are repeated for the change of standard order, OR.

The value in condition type ZUDE is updated accordingly.

 

The following options were explored for the credit memo request creation without any positive result (setup on Public Cloud).

  1. Item copy control.
    1. Tested manual creation of credit memo request by price update ‘C’ (copy manual price elements and redetermine others). Values are updated accordingly.
    2. Pricing type C is not available in system customizing ‘Pricing Type’ on Public Cloud.

 

  1. Use of BADI PRCG_DOC_ITEM_CONDITION_AMOUNT.
    1. Attempted to update the condition control for ZUDE from ‘E’ to ‘A’, without any success.

 

  1. Tested the same steps with reference billing that has condition type TTX1.
    1. The value of TTX1 is updated accordingly with the added discount, although the condition control value is ‘D’ (Fixed).

 

Best regards,

HJ

entry.title: Re: Issue with Automatic Deduction for Semi-Finished Good...
entry.content:
@Nilesh_Bhasare

Hello!

The problem currently is that SAP is receiving all 10 pieces at the production plant instead of deducting 5 for the other plant. The procurement type "70" works; 5 pieces are written off using the 531 movement type to another factory. However, with the 101 movement type, the stock reflects 10 pieces instead of 5. This means the 5 pieces written off by the 531 movement type are not being deducted.

Could you please advise how to ensure the stock at the production plant reflects only the remaining 5 pieces?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector upgrade in high availability environment with SUSE Linux OS
entry.content: Nice Blog....very helpful to everyone 👍

entry.title: Re: Issue with Automatic Deduction for Semi-Finished Good...
entry.content:
The issue you're facing with automatic deduction for semi-finished goods using movement type 101/102 can be resolved by checking the following configurations:

1. Material Master Configuration

  • Verify that the semi-finished goods material is correctly configured in the material master.
  • Ensure that the material type is set to "HAWA" (Semi-Finished Goods) or a similar type that allows automatic deduction.

2. Movement Type Configuration

  • Check the movement type 101/102 configuration to ensure that it's set up for automatic deduction.
  • Verify that the movement type is linked to the correct valuation area and storage location.

3. Storage Location Configuration

  • Ensure that the storage location for the semi-finished goods is correctly configured.
  • Verify that the storage location is linked to the correct valuation area.

4. Automatic Deduction Configuration

  • Check the automatic deduction configuration for the semi-finished goods material.
  • Ensure that the automatic deduction is activated for the movement type 101/102.

5. Check Transaction OBYC

  • Verify that the transaction OBYC is correctly configured for automatic deduction.
By checking these configurations, you should be able to resolve the issue with automatic deduction for semi-finished goods using movement type 101/102.

Example Use Case:

Suppose you're working in a production planning department, and you need to automatically deduct semi-finished goods from storage when they're used in production. By following the above steps, you can ensure that the automatic deduction is correctly configured, and the semi-finished goods are accurately deducted from storage.

Additional Tips:

  • Always verify the material master configuration before troubleshooting automatic deduction issues.
  • Use transaction code MB51 to check the material document for any errors or inconsistencies.
  • Consult the SAP documentation and knowledge base for more information on automatic deduction configuration.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector upgrade in high availability environment with SUSE Linux OS
entry.content: Very Informative.

entry.title: Display Custom Field on Purchase Requisition Items by Account Assignment
entry.content:

Is it possible to add custom fields to such screen?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector upgrade in high availability environment with SUSE Linux OS
entry.content: Very Nice explanation and helpful.

entry.title: Is it possible to perform mTLS authentication with AWS API Gateway via Destination?
entry.content:
Hello.

I am trying to perform mTLS authentication on Gateway and communicate with the backend using the following configuration. However, when I call it from the Fiori app, a 502 error occurs. Could you please tell me the solution?

Verification configuration:

　　Fiori→Approuter→Destination→Gateway

■Destination settings

　URL: Custom domain set in Gateway 　

　Authentication: ClientCertificateAuthentication 　

　Key Store Location: Certificate in p12 format

　Key Store Password: Password when creating p12

　Set "TrustAll" to true in additional properties

　※Destination Setting.png

 An error will occur if you check the connection.

 

■Gateway

　① Custom domain creation

※I ran the curl command as another verification.

If you request the p12 file to the custom domain using the curl command, a normal response will be returned.

 

Thank you.

Best regards,

Kazutoshi Takeda

entry.title: Re: Tax code for sales and purchase
entry.content:
Thank you.

I tired to go through the steps, but I am unable to create a Tax code with the above steps.

Can you please through some light on that as well?

entry.title: Re: Hybris commerce quote Flow
entry.content:
We implemented this in the 2211 version.

use the below properties in local.properties

#customer

commerceservices.quote.buyer.usergroup.uid=customergroup

#seller

commerceservices.quote.seller.usergroup.uid=salesemployeegroup

#sellerapprover

commerceservices.quote.seller.approver.usergroup.uid=salesapprovergroup

Add the corresponding user role in backoffice

for ex

darrin.hesser@acme.com employee add salesemployeegroup under groups, then save the changes.

login as asm now you can see the status for the seller user.

entry.title: Re: BP-country specific tab -branch code missing

Hi,

You can find these details in general data-cust spr. enhan. tab

There are no changes made in vendor master and newly created. 

Kindly suggest what should be done here!

entry.title: Re: Issue with Automatic Deduction for Semi-Finished Good...
entry.content: Hello @ethan13  thank you for your response. I think there might be a slight misunderstanding about my question, so let me clarify. My requirement is not just to post part of the finished goods to another plant but also to ensure that when movement type 531 is used to transfer 5 pieces to another plant, the system deducts those 5 pieces automatically from the total quantity (10 pieces) during goods receipt at the production plant. Currently, the system posts the full quantity (10 pieces) to the production plant stock, ignoring the deduction for the 5 pieces already transferred. Could you advise how to achieve this behavior?"

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.
entry.content:
Hi Swetha,

Please find below note on the recommendation for Mass processing in MDG. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2196009/E

It is recommended to use MDG CMP for BP-S and C, as it supports objects level data processing. 

File upload/download can be used but remember, the file load needs to be done one entity at a time and it is highly recommended for FI objects. 

Regards,
Saravanan

entry.title: Re: In SAP Business One, what is the purpose of the Order...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the Online Help file for the field explanation at the following link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/44fc35d7270541aae10000000a114a6b.html

Order Number

Specify the order number of the chain when you use the direct distribution method.

This number is recorded in the file that you send to the head office of the chain store.

You can also check SAP Note 857666 regarding the same as well.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Error ID: 1470000192 - No es posible la cancelación d...

Hi,

Check the KBA 3108001 - Credit Memo Linked to Down Payments Cannot Be Canceled regarding the issue mentioned by you.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG feature File Download and File Upload.

Thanks for responding, Can you please elaborate on File upload supports objects level data processing and also what does it mean that the file load needs to be done one entity at a time, do you mean it has to be done for General data for one object followed by sales etc?

Thanks,

Swetha

entry.title: how to identify the highest number of rows and the largest size tables within a specific tablespace
entry.content:
Dear All,

I plan to perform a system copy export from an Oracle database to a HANA database, with a size of 6GB. To optimize the process, I intend to implement table splitting.

Using the DBACOCKPIT  transaction code in SAP (SPACE - SEGMENTS - TOP Sizes), I can identify the Top 50 largest table. However, I need to determine which tables have the highest number of rows within a specific tablespace

Could you please advise on how to identify such tables within a specific tablespace?

Is there a way to check this directly in the SAP system, or is there an Oracle query that can be used for this purpose?

Please let me know how to identify the highest number of rows and the largest size tables within a specific tablespace in Oracle.

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: Re: How to setup and run PLC emulator for SAP EWM MFS
entry.content:
Hi Dominik,

Thank you very much for the excellent setup blog and emulator GitHub option.
I have downloaded and updated all the files as per your suggestion
When executing the java command I encounter the below : 

Exception in thread "main" java.lang.UnsupportedClassVersionError: pl/sapusers/mfsplc/bridge/Bridge has been compiled by a more recent version of the Java Runtime (class file version 61.0), this version of the Java Runtime only recognizes class file versions up to 52.0.

I am on version : I have tested both on Mac and Windows 

java 23.0.1 2024-10-15 - Mac
Java(TM) SE Runtime Environment (build 23.0.1+11-39)

windows 

java version "1.8.0_411"
Java(TM) SE Runtime Environment (build 1.8.0_411-b09)
Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM (build 25.411-b09, mixed mode)

 

 

Please advise

Thank you 

Narayani

entry.title: How to set up Manage Sales Order ( Live Process Project ) in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
We are in the process of implementing the Manage Sales Order (Live Process Project) in SAP Build Process Automation, but we have a few queries regarding the configuration setup:
1. In the attached screenshot, we can see that the functionality is typically achieved using Workflow Management. However, the documentation mentions that this functionality can be achieved either by Workflow Management or Build Process Automation. Could you please provide the process flow steps for achieving this functionality using Build Process Automation?

 

2. In the Functionality Diagram, Event Mesh is part of Workflow. Since we are following Build Process Automation, do we need to set up Event Mesh, or is it already available within Build Process Automation? If it's available, where can we check this functionality? If it's not available, could you guide us on how and where to set it up?

 

3. For configuring Cloud Integration, please provide the Configuration Setup Guide and explain how it works in the context of SAP Build Process Automation.

 

4. Is it mandatory to configure an Email Destination in SAP BTP, or is it already preconfigured in the Build Process Automation project?

 

5. Is it mandatory to configure Workflow Destinations in SAP BTP for SAP Build Process Automation, or is this not required since we are only using Build Process Automation and not Workflow?

 

6. Is Process Visibility Service required in Build Process Automation? If so, how can we set it up, as the service is not available in BTP? 

 

7. Is configuring a Business Rules Destination required in Build Process Automation? If yes, could you please clarify the URL that needs to be provided? The Setup Guide mentions the URL part but doesn’t provide full details, so we would appreciate it if you could provide the complete URL format. 

 

could you please guide us on how to set up the necessary configurations .

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Event Mesh SAP Cloud for Customer integration with SAP S/4HANA  SAP Business Workflow SAP Workflow Management SAP Workflow Management, process visibility capability 

Thanks & Regards,
Vijay Kumar.

entry.title: Can SAP EAM be integrated with Oracle Fusion cloud or does it need S/4 HANA as pre-requisite?
entry.content: Hi, Can SAP EAM be integrated with Oracle Fusion cloud or does it need S/4 HANA as pre-requisite?

entry.title: Re: Authorizations
entry.content:
Hi,

The authorization for the G/L Account Determination, if that is set as 'Read-only' for the user, then these fields will be greyed out and cannot be changed.

In your screenshot, it can be seen that other field are editable and only the checkbox 'Permit Change of Control Accounts' is greyed out.

You can check below 3 things on COPY of the database:

1. By commenting/removing the additional code (if added) in the SP_TransactionNotification & SP_PostTransactionNotice, does the checkbox appear editable?

2. Create a new user ID and see what is the status of the checkbox in new login.

3. Check if there are any customization and what is the status if such customizations are removed.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to update data in custom facet with the use of da...
entry.content: See below

entry.title: Error program SPALTAX1a field symbol with length 0 should have been created.
entry.content:
While executing ME22n/ME23N Getting below error. I tried to deactivate Plant Abroad but did not work. In MM Tax with plant set up also I checked but no clues.

In an ASSIGN statement in the program "SAPLTAX1" a field symbol with

length 0 should have been created. However, this is not possible.

length 0.

This is not possible.

CALL FUNCTION 'CHECK_PLANTS_ABROAD_ACTIVE'

EXPORTING

I_BUKRS = BUCHUNGSKREIS

IMPORTING

E_FI_ISACTIVE = XWIA.

HSWAE = T001-WAERS.

IF T001-XMWSN NE SPACE.

STEUER_NETTO = 'X'.

ELSE.

STEUER_NETTO = SPACE.

ENDIF.

SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005 WHERE LAND1 = T001-LAND1.

IF SY-SUBRC NE 0 OR T005-KALSM IS INITIAL.

MESSAGE E720 WITH T001-LAND1 RAISING NOT_FOUND.

ELSE.

MOVE: T005-KALSM TO SCHEMA.

MOVE: T005-KALSM TO KALSM.

ENDIF.

------- Daten fuer Netto-Steuerung / US-Taxes setzen ----------------*

CLEAR TTXD.

SELECT SINGLE * FROM TTXD WHERE KALSM = T005-KALSM.

IF SY-SUBRC = 0.

J = TTXD-LENG1 + TTXD-LENG2 + TTXD-LENG3 + TTXD-LENG4.

I = TTXD-LENG1.

K = J - I.

ASSIGN *TTXJ-TXJCD(I) TO <F3>.

IF K > 0.

ASSIGN *TTXJ-TXJCD+I(K) TO <R3>.

ELSE.

ASSIGN CNULL(1) TO <R3>

Regards

Prakash P.

entry.title: Re: How to update data in custom facet with the use of da...
entry.content:
Hi Jayant, I have created a custom facet/tab in Opportunity BO. In that tab i have added advanced list pan column with the help of SDK. sales team will be update PO details manually. Now i want to make that PO details update through data workbench when there will me multiples PO details for each opportunities. According to your shared link, i have created custom OData services called "opp_podetails_facet", now the thing is that, i don't know how to fetch the custom Odata fields in standard Odata. I have checked standard OData, where i cannot seen extension facet fields.

 

 

 

Thank you!!

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: Can unofficial user rating in the form be synced with MLT goal rating?
entry.content:
Problem Statement : We have a single goal plan that utilizes a metric lookup table. This table contains various ranges and guidelines specific to each goal, allowing employees the flexibility to set these parameters when defining their goals, as illustrated in the screenshot below.

We have a single standard "actual" field where employees, managers, and other raters input their respective actual values, overwriting each other's entries. Based on these inputs, the goal rating is generated.

Since we are using Rating Option 2, the employee and other raters provide an unofficial user rating, while the manager provides an item rating in the performance form. Each rating is captured separately. As a result, the MLT goal rating and the form’s star rating do not sync automatically. The user must manually enter the unofficial user star rating in the form and reference the goal rating for comparison.

Is there a way to automatically sync the goal rating with the form’s star rating, which reflects the unofficial user rating?

entry.title: Re: Ai Assisted Skill Match
entry.content:
Hi @Avinesh 

So for me it looks like this:

The matching Skills from Candidate CV and Job Description are marked green for primary and secondary skills and blue for Relevant Skills.

Skills are categorized as Primary and Secondary (defined by the recruiter), Relevant (important but not primary/secondary), and Unmatched (identified from the CV but not relevant to the Job Requisition).

Hope that helps,

BR

Martin

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hello.. happy to join the community!

entry.title: Pass additional field from ERP to EWM while creating EGR in EWM . Could you please help.

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skill Matching for Applicant Screening Qu...
entry.content:
Hi @csoriano 

here you find the currently supported languages for Skill matching and AI: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/e15477b0414b4b25b224a97ad52c12ec/54d0d7ed092346aab4a5dae9b8026e31.html?locale=en-US

The skills come from a universal skill taxonomy, so I suppose, from a universal data base with general skills.

You cannot test the AI features for free yet. You would need to purchase AI Units also for your TEST Instance. But you could purchase just some units and try it.

entry.title: SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)
entry.content:
The SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) is a Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS) offering from SAP that provides a comprehensive suite of services and tools for businesses to:

Integrate and extend SAP applications: BTP allows you to seamlessly connect and enhance existing SAP solutions (like S/4HANA) with new functionalities and integrations.
Build new business applications: You can develop custom applications using various programming languages, frameworks, and tools, tailored to specific business needs.
Analyze data and gain insights: BTP provides tools for data warehousing, business intelligence, and advanced analytics, enabling data-driven decision-making.
Automate business processes: You can automate repetitive tasks and workflows using robotic process automation (RPA) and workflow management capabilities.
Implement intelligent technologies: BTP offers access to AI, machine learning, and Internet of Things (IoT) services, enabling you to build intelligent applications and solutions.

In essence, SAP BTP acts as a central hub for innovation and digital transformation within an organization's SAP landscape.

Here's a breakdown of its key roles:

Integration: BTP facilitates seamless integration between SAP and non-SAP systems, both on-premise and in the cloud. This allows businesses to connect their entire IT landscape and create end-to-end business processes.
Extension: BTP enables you to extend the functionality of existing SAP applications without modifying the core code. This ensures that customizations don't interfere with future updates and upgrades.
Innovation: BTP provides a platform for developing new and innovative applications that address specific business challenges and opportunities. This empowers businesses to create unique solutions that differentiate them from their competitors.
Agility: BTP offers a flexible and scalable environment for developing and deploying applications. This allows businesses to respond quickly to changing market conditions and customer demands.

Key components of SAP BTP:

SAP Integration Suite: Connects various systems and applications.
SAP Extension Suite: Enables extending existing SAP solutions.
SAP Analytics Cloud: Provides business intelligence and analytics capabilities.
SAP Data Management Suite: Offers tools for data warehousing and data management.
SAP Intelligent Technologies: Includes AI, machine learning, and IoT services.

In simple terms:

Imagine your core SAP system as the engine of your business. SAP BTP is like a workshop next to it, providing all the tools and resources you need to:

Tune the engine: Optimize existing processes and functionalities.
Add new parts: Build new applications and integrations.
Monitor performance: Analyze data and gain insights.
Automate tasks: Streamline workflows and improve efficiency.
 
By leveraging SAP BTP, businesses can unlock the full potential of their SAP investments and drive digital transformation across their organization.
 
 
https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_the-sap-business-technology-platform-btp-activity-7281219256862576640-tXTf?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop

entry.title: Re: 两家公司皆使用IFRS会计原则，需要激活1GA吗?
entry.content: 不是特别理解方案2，在什么情况下你们需要开两个账套但两个账套却用同样的会计准则？

entry.title: Re: sap.m.radiobutton circle not visible

Hello,

Regards,
Srinivas

entry.title: Best Practice for having two company manager in one company
entry.content:
Hello,

in BYD our org structure looks like this:

- company
   - business residence
      - different departments

In the near future, we will need to have two individuals in company management with equal hierarchical status.
What is the best approach to reflect this situation within the organizational structure?
The challenge is that the system only allows one person to be assigned as the organizational unit manager for both the company and business location.
How can this limitation be addressed effectively? It is not acceptable to assign either one person or the other at this level.
Thank you very much.

To ensure accurate reporting lines, an additional layer will be added to the hierarchy. This should work fine for us.
- company
  - business residence
      - company manager 1
           - different departments
      - company manager 2
           - different departments

entry.title: Service with Advanced Execution: Process Flow 5 – Late Billing Decision in Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Service with Advanced Execution is a new service business process in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. This is based on the integration of Service with Maintenance Management.

The concept of Execution Status in Service with Advanced Execution is introduced in the following blog: 

Execution Status in Service with Advanced Execution

Within Service with Advanced Execution, there are various process flows depending on the business scenario. These process flows are distinguished based on two aspects:

  • How the process starts, and which is the first transaction.
  • What is the trigger for the creation of the maintenance order and eventually the start of planning.

Process Flow 5:

This blog showcases the process flow wherein the initial transaction is the maintenance order, and later it is decided to make it billable and thus charge the customer. This is when the service order is created along with an execution order item to bill the customer for the service.

For example, there is a manufacturing company who owns and operates multiple high-tech machines at a customer site under a long-term service contract. The routine maintenance of these machines is taken care by the manufacturing company at no cost to the customer. At a certain instance, the technician from the manufacturing company is performing a routine maintenance activity and created a maintenance order for this purpose. However, during the inspection of the machine, the technician identifies a malfunction caused by mishandling of the equipment. In this case, the technician takes the decision to bill the customer for the resolution of the malfunction.

In such scenarios, when a presumed maintenance needs to be billed, a service order can be created corresponding to an existing maintenance order. Using this service order, the billing document can be generated once the service is completed.

Creation of Billable Maintenance Order

A service order creation can be triggered from a maintenance order by selecting the ‘Billable’ checkbox in the Change Maintenance Order (IW32) screen.

When the ‘Billable’ checkbox is selected you can enter the sales data and service details which includes fields such as sold-to party, sales organization, distribution channel, service product, and quantity. On save, a corresponding service order with an execution order item is created. The lifecycle status of this item is ‘In Process’ and the execution status is ‘Execution Planning’.

The document flow in the service order can be viewed in Transaction History assignment block.

The details of the maintenance order connected to the execution order item can be viewed in the Maintenance Order assignment block in the item details page.

Further, the regular flow and options of the service order processing follows.

Status lifecycle in Service with Advanced Execution

                                                      Current state of an execution order item

The state diagram illustrates the status lifecycle of one execution order item along with its corresponding maintenance order in this process flow. Each block below represents a state displaying 3 different status values. The lifecycle and execution status of an execution order item along with the status of the corresponding maintenance order.

 

 

Release of Maintenance Order

Once the service order is created from the maintenance order, the maintenance order is in planning phase. After the planning is done, the maintenance order is set to ‘REL’ (Released) by the Maintenance Planner. This automatically triggers the release of the execution order item. With this status transition, the execution status on the execution order item is set to ‘In Execution’.

Technical Completion of Maintenance Order

After the execution of service is completed by the Maintenance Technician, the maintenance order status is set to ‘TECO’ (Technically Completed).  With this status transition, the lifecycle status of execution order item is set to ‘Completed’. The execution status on the execution order item is set to ‘Execution Done’.

Summary

The distinct feature in this process flow is the creation of service order from a maintenance order after making it billable for customer. As we proceed with the execution of the job, the lifecycle and execution status of execution order item are in continuous alignment with the status of maintenance order at every step.

 

Further references

To know more about the execution order item and its attributes, please refer following blog:

Deep Dive: Execution Order Item and Billable Maintenance Order

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance: Balance Reporting – Part 3: Custom report creation for balance re

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024: Enhancing the Candidate Experience with Embedded AI in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content:
Hi @amphill 

thanks for your great insights. Very helpful!

Regarding Simplified Candidate Authentication do you know when this will be made available for EU Access Instances? Are there any planned dates? We are eagerly waiting for this on our German Datacenter.

@Avinesh: From my own experience: We have activated the Unified Data Model for quite some german customers with strict GDPR Compliance. There was not issue at all. I'd recommend you to take that step. If you like, you could check my blog on what it does and how to get there: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/career-site-builder-unified-data-model-new-job-search-layout-and-design/ba-p/13573642

Feel free to reach out to me in case of any detailled questions.

BR

Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Hana DB: Feature not supported on this instance

Once this was successfully deployed, I created the HANA Cloud DB with HANA Tools - 'Create Instance' button. Here, it allowed to make changes configuration. However, it's just a workaround.

entry.title: Re: Best Practice for distributing Key Extensibility Objects in different Software Collection
entry.content: For extensibility Item, One software collection is one TR in the backendend. In theory, it can contains all type of dev objects. So why you want to restrict it? The extensibilty spec can manually put the extension item/dev object to different software collection.

entry.title: Re: Unable to consume data from a odata service
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 
still in need of your help while continuing with the building of the app using this service,
let say the service is: 
https://dummylink.sap.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZWEB_ORDERING_SRV

I am enabling an entity say MaterialSet which has fields like Image, materialdescription, price, currency, materialName and more.

 


Dragging and dropping a Large image list item I am repeating with the data variable that I have already created from the data source

The time label and description text are set to data item in repeat to MaterialDescription field and price field.

coming to the image source the data item in repeat option is incompatible and so I have to opt for the formula, which is where I am facing the problem

I tried to get the path of the image from the URL used and tried it as a formula but I am unable to see the images while previewing.

FYI, the images from the data source used are in base64 format, a glimpse of the browse real data from the source I am using,

while previewing the app, I am unable to get the images.

can you please me with setting the formula right.

Best Regards,
Yashmin Behera

SAP Build

entry.title: Re: How to Call RAP Actions with Table Types from a List Report
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake Please let me know the ZA_AMOUNT. Is this a structure? I am getting the output like AMOUNT:1000 in upper case.

And where you found  the wa to construct the calling url.is there any reference ?

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
Hi @VanessaLi ,

Team Goals were supposed to replace Group Goals in Latest Goal Management, but there are still issues when admin users are assigning Team Goals as Group Goals to all employees or employees based on certain filters.

When assigning Team Goals to for example a Division with 500 employees, the admin user cannot select all users, but needs to scroll down, wait for the list to be refreshed, scroll down, wait, scroll, wait until they have reached the bottom of the list of employees (= 25 times scroll & wait). The search window only shows 20 employees at the time, and Select All only selects the employees which are visible in the window. This is again causing frustration for admin users, as customers are setting 2025 goals as we speak. Is this enhancement proceeding?  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/309177 

The other issue is with the filters when assigning Team Goals as Group Goals: you can only select one filter at the time. So imagine you have a Group Goal that should be assigned to for example all 4000 employees. There is no option to assign to All users, but you need to use filters. Let's say your company has 15 Divisions. Admin user needs to assign the same Team Goal 15 times to get it assigned to all employees, since you can only select one Division at the time as filter. And then you still need to do all the scrolling and waiting to be able to select all employees in that Division as mentioned above. Is this enhancement ever proceeding? https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/309147 

Both of these are very important for admin user experience and adoption of Latest Goal Management. 

BR,
Marika

My question is is there any way that we can configure a custom column so that column can differentiate between euros and % (when the column read something display the value in % if not in euros).

Thanks a lot Xavier!

entry.title: Re: How to update data in custom facet with the use of da...
entry.content:
Hi Dhaval,

Since you have created these fields in the standard xbo from sdk, you have to create odata extension scenario for standard xbo and add these custom field to desired standard odata. Post which the custom fields will start appearing in data workbench.

Please refer https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/new-feature-odata-service-extension-with-extension-fields-in-sdk/ba-p/13348038.

Thanks,

Jayant Saini

entry.title: HANA HotSpots General Reportの生成依頼
entry.content:
S4HANA DIGITS Initial Shipment Stack から S4HANA DIGITS SPS01 へのアップグレード後、様々なビジネストランザクション、特に更新系アクションで処理速度が低下する事象が発生しており、原因分析のためGeneral Reportをもとに調査を行いたいと考えております。

PERSON_NAME HotSpots General Reportを生成いただく、または生成方法をご教示いただくことは可能でしょうか。

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Best Practice for having two company manager in one c...
entry.content:
Hi,

Unfortunately, it is not possible to have two managers per one org unit as the 'intercompany' approach is not supported in ByD so only one manager at the time can be assigned to an org unit.

Additionally, please find below the answers for more questions that may arise about the org unit assignments: 

1. Is it possible to have multiple managers for the same org unit on a different timeline?

Yes, it is possible to define a manager for an org unit based on a defined timeline.

For example, we want to have Manager1 for the org unit A1 for September and Manager2 for the same org unit A1 for October.

This can be done as following:

  1. Go to Organizational management work center
  2. Select Edit org structure
  3. Highlight the org unit you would like to edit, A1 in this case
  4. Enter the desired date for the 'Edit Organizational Structure - Effective From' in this case as follow:
    • For Manager1 - We have a date from today save the org structure, with today's date, the date will then appear from today to unlimited
    • For Manager2 - enter the date 01/10/2010 and save the org structure the date will then appear from today to unlimited

       

       2. Is it possible to have the same manager for multiple org unit?

      Yes, it is possible to have the same manager assigned to different org unit for different companies.

      For example, Employee1 is assigned as manager to org unit A1 from company A and org unit B1 from company B.

      3. Is it possible to have an employee assigned to the same org unit as employee and as manager of the org unit?

      Yes, it is possible to have the employee assigned as both manager and employee for the same org unit.

      For example, Employee1 is assigned to org unit A1 as employee and as manager of the org unit A1.

      Scenario:

      We have two companies A & B.

      Company A has org unit A1-A2-A3 assigned to it.

      Company B has org unit B1-B2-B3 assigned to it.

       

      For more details kindly refer to the KBA : 1505349

       

      Best regards,

      Darshan

entry.title: Re: HANA HotSpots General Reportの生成依頼

-> 7. How to use it?（Manual）

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content: @MarikaS  We are trying hard to push the two enhancements to release. Since they do not fall under the Goals domain, and much rather fall under the Search domain, I have forwarded this to our internal Search team to consider it for 1H 2025.
